title: schnella confertiflora
side_effects: Schnella confertiflora can have side effects if used improperly, such as inducing allergic reactions in some individuals, including skin irritation, hives, and respiratory issues. Ingesting the plant's leaves or roots can cause gastrointestinal problems, including nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea. Improper use of Schnella confertiflora can also lead to liver and kidney damage due to its toxic compounds, which can cause fatigue, weakness, and other systemic issues. It is essential to consult a medical professional before using Schnella confertiflora for any health benefits.
